subcodes.first_line: O scion of that martyred Sovereign, that luminous Star! Though outwardly in the West [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سلیلهاى آن سرور شهید آن کوکب نورانى هر چند بظاهر در مغرب
subcodes.subjects: @predictions and prophecies, @martyrs and martyrdom, @eulogies; reminiscences, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @exhortations and counsels
